title: Trump says U.S. bombed Kharg Island, striking core of Iran’s oil economy
summary_full: About 90 percent of the country’s oil exports move through facilities on Kharg Island, located some 15 miles from the mainland in the Persian Gulf.
summary_public: About 90 percent of the country’s oil exports move through facilities on Kharg Island, located some 15 miles from the mainland in the Persian Gulf.
